name: Component removed from library — tests critical change detection and impact analysis

input.userMessage: Diff the current Figma library against our extracted design system

currentState.note: Toast was deleted from the Figma library but still referenced in index.json and relationships.json

expectedBehaviors: Classifies Toast removal as CRITICAL severity, not just 'removed'
Explains WHY it is critical: Toast is a feedback/notification component used across many flows
Queries relationships.json or Figma to find which components contain or depend on Toast
Lists specific frames or screens that use Toast instances (e.g., form submissions, error handling, success confirmations)
Checks if Toast was replaced by something else (e.g., a new Snackbar component) or truly deleted
Recommends immediate action: re-add Toast, migrate to replacement, or acknowledge intentional removal
Flags that existing Figma instances of Toast will show as missing component (yellow warning diamond)
antiPatterns: Reports '1 component removed' without naming it or explaining impact
Lists the removal as INFO or WARNING severity instead of CRITICAL
Does not check what depends on Toast — treats it as an isolated deletion
Only compares counts (35 vs 34) without identifying which component is missing
Does not check whether a replacement component was added
Produces a generic 'component was removed, consider re-adding' message without context
Ignores that existing instances in frames will break (missing component warnings)

evaluationCriteria.detectionAccuracy: Does it identify Toast specifically as the removed component, not just a count difference?
evaluationCriteria.severityClassification: Does it classify this as CRITICAL, recognizing that removing a feedback component breaks user flows?
evaluationCriteria.impactAnalysis: Does it trace Toast dependencies — which frames use it, which components contain it?
evaluationCriteria.replacementCheck: Does it investigate whether Toast was replaced by a new component (e.g., Snackbar) or truly deleted?
evaluationCriteria.actionableRecommendation: Does it recommend concrete next steps, not just 'component was removed'?
evaluationCriteria.instanceAwareness: Does it warn about orphaned Toast instances showing missing-component warnings in Figma?
